title: dendranthema sinchangense
intro: Dendranthema sinchangense, also known as Korean mountain daisy or sinchangense, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is traditionally used in Korean herbal medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Dendranthema sinchangense include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support immune function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for the common cold and flu. In traditional Korean medicine, Dendranthema sinchangense is often prepared as a decoction, tincture, or tea to harness its medicinal properties, and is also used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
